title: MUX8 or MUX16 cells doesn't present in the netlist when use 'abc -mux8' or 'abc -mux16' command

features.name: variable-indexed bit selection creating wide multiplexer
features.description: Code should include a variable-indexed bit selection from a wide vector (256+ bits) to create a large multiplexer structure that exercises synthesis tool's mux mapping
features.snippet:
input [7:0] S,
input [255:0] D,
output M256
assign M256 = D[S];
